review_text: Every time I place a limit order for options it gets filled at a worse price. The mobile app has serious latency issues during market open hours.
Tried adding funds via UPI. The money was deducted from my bank but never credited to Groww. Raised a ticket 3 days ago — still no resolution.
Asked to do re-KYC even though I completed it last month. The selfie upload keeps failing with a vague error message. Support just keeps asking me to retry.

review_title: App crashes at 9:15 AM every day
review_text: Without fail the app freezes right when the market opens. I missed a critical trade because of this crash. Has been happening since the last update two weeks ago.
The chatbot cannot understand anything beyond basic queries. When I escalate to a human wait time is 45+ minutes. Other brokers respond within minutes.
Super clean interface fast execution great mutual fund options. The SIP feature works flawlessly. Highly recommend Groww to anyone starting their investment journey.

review_title: Good app but iOS needs polish
review_text: The Android version seems more polished than iOS. A few UI elements are misaligned and the chart tooltip behaves oddly on iPhone 15 Pro. Otherwise great product.
My withdrawal request has been pending for 5 days. The status just says Processing. No updates from support. I need these funds urgently.
I've uploaded my PAN card 4 times in different lighting and orientations. It keeps saying document not clear. This onboarding experience is terrible.
The candlestick chart shows a different LTP than the order book. This mismatch confused me into placing a wrong order. Please fix the real-time data sync.
Setting up SIPs is incredibly smooth. The fund comparison feature helped me pick the right fund. Transaction history is well-organized. Five stars!
Woke up to find my account frozen. No email no in-app notification explaining why. I have active positions! This is completely unacceptable.
I placed a buy limit order at 9:16 AM. It sat pending for 20 minutes even though the price crossed my limit multiple times.
If you're into mutual funds this is the app. SIP management NAV tracking portfolio analysis — all excellent. Stock trading could use some improvement.
My bank's UPI handle is not recognized by Groww even though it works on every other app. I've been unable to add funds for a week now.

review_title: Support ticket ignored for a week
review_text: Opened a ticket about an incorrect transaction on Day 1. It's now Day 7 and the only response I got was an automated acknowledgement.
The consolidated portfolio view across stocks mutual funds and gold is amazing. XIRR calculation is accurate. Best wealth management interface I've used.
After the latest iOS update Face ID stopped working. I have to enter my password every single time. Reported this a week ago with no fix in sight.
The KYC verification process took 4 days when competitors do it in hours. The video KYC step kept timing out and I had to reschedule multiple times.
There's no clear explanation of T+1 vs T+2 settlement in the app. I sold shares expecting funds by next day but they came two days later.
The new dark mode looks fantastic on OLED. Watchlist management is very intuitive. Just wish the news feed loaded faster.
My options P&L in the portfolio section shows a completely wrong value. The individual positions are correct but the aggregate is off by lakhs.
During re-KYC the Aadhaar OTP is supposed to arrive from UIDAI. It never comes on time — usually 10-15 minutes late and often expired.
Added funds via NEFT and they were credited within 30 minutes. Execution speed for large orders is excellent. Groww has improved massively over the last year.
My watchlist doesn't sync between my iPhone and iPad. I add a stock on one device and it doesn't show up on the other. Minor but annoying.
Market order placed during high volatility got filled almost 2% away from the quoted price. Need better price protection for retail investors.

review_title: Bank not linked even after retry
review_text: Tried linking my HDFC account 5 times. Each time it says verification failed. The UPI payment option also doesn't work with my VPA.
The list of acceptable documents for re-KYC is not clearly mentioned in the app. Wasted time uploading wrong documents. Add better guidance.
App completely froze when I tried to square off my futures position at 3:25 PM. Had to force-close the app and lost significant money due to delay.
Customer care has noticeably improved. My last issue was resolved within 24 hours via chat. Keep it up!
Groww is the most user-friendly app for mutual fund investments. The fact that I can start SIP with just Rs 100 is great. Very happy with the returns visibility.
The settlement amount shown in my ledger doesn't match what I calculated based on my trades. There seems to be a discrepancy in brokerage deductions.
The video KYC slot booking shows as unavailable for 3 consecutive days. I need to complete my account upgrade. Please add more slots.
The app placed a duplicate order when I tapped the buy button once. Got charged for two lots instead of one. Support says they can't cancel post-execution.
The Greeks display for options is the best I've seen in any Indian broker app. The payoff chart is very useful for planning strategies.
Average wait time to connect to a human agent is 30-40 minutes. The bot handles less than 20% of queries properly. Need significant improvement.
My mutual fund redemption request was processed but funds haven't hit my bank account in 4 business days. T+3 is the norm but this is T+6.
From account opening to first investment everything was smooth. Highly recommended for beginners and experienced investors alike.
Getting 15-20 push notifications per day about stocks I've never shown interest in. The notification preference settings don't seem to work.
My SIP auto-debit failed for the month but I received no notification. Found out only when I manually checked. Please add failure alerts.
The watchlist price refresh sometimes lags by 2-3 seconds during heavy trading sessions. Not a dealbreaker but could be improved.
The fundamental data and analyst reports available in the app are comprehensive. Comparing stocks side by side is very handy for decision making.
The tax P&L statement for FY24 shows incorrect buy prices for some stocks due to corporate actions not being adjusted properly. This will cause issues when filing ITR.
Applied for two IPOs seamlessly via UPI mandate. The allotment status update was prompt. Groww makes IPO investing very accessible.
The options chain takes 8-10 seconds to load on a 5G connection. By the time it loads the premiums have already changed significantly.
Some screens in the app haven't been updated for dark mode. The holdings detail page still shows a white background while everything else is dark.
The login OTP takes 5+ minutes to arrive via SMS. By then the session times out and I have to request again. Makes login extremely frustrating.
Adding a new bank account was much faster than expected. Penny drop verification worked instantly and the bank was live within minutes.
The overall portfolio P&L percentage doesn't account for dividends received. This makes my actual returns look worse than they are.
The recent redesign is excellent. The home screen now shows relevant information at a glance. The app feels much faster and more responsive than before.
